headlines.title: Explosion kills 26 at fireworks plant in central China province
headlines.summary: Explosion at fireworks plant in central China kills at least 26 people and injures others, state media reports. Search and rescue completed but casualty verification continues. Xi Jinping orders thorough probe, underscoring industrial safety failures.

framings.angle: Blast kills 21 people and wounds 61 at fireworks factory
State media reports 26 killed after search and rescue completes

headlines.title: WHO confirms 7 hantavirus cases including 3 deaths on MV Hondius cruise ship
headlines.summary: Hantavirus outbreak linked to MV Hondius cruise off Cabo Verde reaches 7 cases with 3 deaths and 1 Briton in intensive care. Traps 147 from 23 countries including 17 Americans. WHO tracks spread risking global travel.

headlines.title: Russia declares unilateral ceasefire in Ukraine for Victory Day
headlines.summary: Russia announces truce across Ukraine on May 9-10 for WWII Victory Day but threatens retaliation against disruptions. Pauses hostilities in year-long war, offering brief respite amid ongoing conflict.

headlines.title: U.S. warships shoot down missiles drones targeting ships in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: U.S. Navy downs missiles and drones attacking escorted ships in Hormuz; UAE blames Iran drone strike. Iran targets tankers and UAE amid war. Threatens global oil flows and wider Middle East conflict.
headlines.previousContext: U.S. engages threats during first escorts under Project Freedom; UAE attributes attacks to Iran

framings.angle: U.S. warships down missiles drones at Gulf ships; UAE blames Iran
U.S. sinks Iranian fast-attack boats targeting ships and UAE
Iran deploys 1980s playbook enhanced by drones against shipping

headlines.title: BJP clinches West Bengal assembly elections after leading vote count
headlines.summary: Narendra Modi's BJP wins West Bengal after years of gains, altering state politics. India's foreign ministry condemns Iran over UAE attack. Expands BJP footprint challenging regional dominance.
headlines.previousContext: Vote count finalizes BJP victory following leads in nearly 200 seats

headlines.title: Explosion kills 9 workers in Colombia coal mine after gas buildup warning
headlines.summary: Coal mine explosion kills 9 workers despite weeks-earlier national agency warning on gas dangers. Impacts mining communities in Colombia. Triggers safety audits and regulatory scrutiny.

headlines.title: Mali leader Assimi Goïta assumes defense role after minister killed in bombing
headlines.summary: Junta leader Assimi Goïta takes defense minister duties post Sadio Camara's death in suspected suicide bombing during attacks. Affects Mali's fight against insurgents; consolidates military control.

headlines.title: Israeli settlers intensify attacks against Palestinians in West Bank
headlines.summary: Israeli settlers escalate violence on Palestinians in West Bank as global attention shifts to Iran war. Military officials call for government action. Risks broader unrest in occupied territories.
